statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Completed the next Anton slice: a Diagnostics iPhone density pass.

Changed:
- Scoped Diagnostics with `body.diagnostics-page`.
- Tightened mobile workflow cards, diagnostic symptom cards, source notes, hero shortcuts, and section spacing in [styles.css](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/styles.css).
- Converted Quick Checks into stacked mobile rows while preserving desktop table behavior in [diagnostics.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/diagnostics.html).
- Changed the mobile bottom action from `Checks` to `Flows`, pointing to `#workflow-index`.
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v264`.
- Updated Anton state/backlog/roadmap/audit notes and added a durable lesson to `ANTON.md`.

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome passed iPhone and desktop checks: no horizontal overflow, 7 workflow cards, compact mobile cards, stacked Quick Checks, source-note sizing, warning-light anchor settling, search result for `workflow index`, and Search Escape cleanup.
- Captured screenshots:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v264-diagnostics-mobile-density.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v264-diagnostics-mobile-warning-anchor.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v264-diagnostics-desktop-density.png`

Known issue remains: `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1` with Edge still fails on `diagnostics.html` by rendering without the main landmark, matching the existing empty-DOM/Edge path problem. Playwright/Chrome fallback passed.

Next clean slice: Garage diagnostic activity filter/export after real data accumulates, or real-device review of the new Diagnostics mobile density before adding more workflow surfaces.
